raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Firefighter gear has been found to contain significant levels of per-fluoroalkyl and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS).",
    "PFAS are man-made chemicals that are harmful to both human health and the environment.",
    "PFAS accumulate in the human body and can cause cancer.",
    "The National Fire Protection Association (NFPA) sets safety and quality standards for firefighting equipment.",
    "Currently, a light degradation resistance test used by NFPA can only be passed by adding PFAS to firefighting gear.",
    "The upcoming revision of the NFPA standard proposes removing the UV light test because it does not apply to the materials inside the fabric of firefighter gear.",
    "The legislation AB 2408 will protect California firefighters by banning turnout gear that contains PFAS.",
    "AB 2408 will ensure that PFAS will be banned from firefighter gear as soon as a safe alternative for water resistance is available."
  ]
}
```
